security.csp: default-src 'self' ipc:; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' 'unsafe-eval'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; connect-src 'self' ipc: http://localhost:5173 http://localhost:8000 https://apohara-inti.dev; img-src 'self' data:; font-src 'self' data:

bundle.shortDescription: Cross-AI code verifier with INV-15 memory isolation
bundle.longDescription: Apohara Inti — a different AI reviews the code your AI just wrote, while your agent memory stays isolated. BYOK Gemini + 9 frontier attacker vendors + Apohara ContextForge memory plane for INV-15 enforcement.
